violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils ice machine were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was turned off and put out of service at the time of inspection. Ice machine is not to be used until it is cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment is not to use dishwasher until it is able to reach the proper chlorine sanitizer concentration. Establishment is using single service cups until the dishwasher is serviced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2025
Establishment is lacking drain plugs for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain drain plugs. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025
